acceptance_targets: [chapter_01_award_001] By the end of snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:273, a reader can identify one concrete consequence that has already happened because Owen chose C-13 over Martha's request; if the ending still closes only on planning, curiosity, or future intent, this fails.

[chapter_01_dialogue_001] In the revised breakfast exchange, no more than one of Martha's rebukes can read as a standalone aphorism; at least two of her lines in the confrontation must show visible speech pressure or concrete bodily/task-rooted diction while preserving her high contraction use.

[chapter_01_prose_001] Across those revised beats, there should be no sequence of more than one clipped narration fragment that depends on omitted subjects or articles for emphasis; the emphasis must instead land through complete syntax, image, or sentence rhythm visible on the page.

findings.acceptance_test: By the end of snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:273, a reader can identify one concrete consequence that has already happened because Owen chose C-13 over Martha's request; if the ending still closes only on planning, curiosity, or future intent, this fails.
findings.problem: The chapter lands Owen's internal pivot cleanly, but the ending stops at intention rather than an already-incurred consequence. That keeps the opener at the level of elegant setup instead of shortlist-level impact: he chooses C-13 over Martha's ask, yet the chapter closes before that choice costs him anything concrete on the page.
findings.rewrite_direction: In the closing movement centered on snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:211, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:265, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:269, add one immediate repercussion of Owen choosing C-13 over the tapestry errand. Strategy options that fit the existing spine include making the missed resistance obligation materially present, leaving evidence of his return to the damaged stacks, or forcing a visible compromise on the walk back. Keep the state shift toward secret pursuit, but make the choice wound, cost, or expose him before the chapter ends.

findings.acceptance_test: In the revised breakfast exchange, no more than one of Martha's rebukes can read as a standalone aphorism; at least two of her lines in the confrontation must show visible speech pressure or concrete bodily/task-rooted diction while preserving her high contraction use.
findings.problem: Martha's breakfast rebukes repeatedly land as polished diagnoses or quotable punchlines rather than pressured teenage speech. Her bluntness and contractions are right, but lines such as the year disappearing under 'being sensible,' Owen answering 'the bit of the sentence that lets you get away,' and detention becoming 'a personality' sound composed enough to sand off the bodily, task-rooted messiness her style-bible voice calls for.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework Martha's confrontation around snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:75, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:91, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:113 so her anger arrives through more table-level, practical language and more audible pressure. Keep her moral clarity, but roughen at least two of the writerly lines with interruption, repetition, restart, or concrete references to food, bodies, chores, or the first-years she is trying to move.

findings.acceptance_test: Across those revised beats, there should be no sequence of more than one clipped narration fragment that depends on omitted subjects or articles for emphasis; the emphasis must instead land through complete syntax, image, or sentence rhythm visible on the page.
findings.problem: The narration leans too often on clipped emphasis fragments and negation bursts ('Boring on purpose. Safe.' / 'A shelf mark. A direction.' / 'Curfew, cellar, bed.' / 'Not merely a mark.' / 'Sealed, then. Not gone.'). Because this construction appears well over twice in one chapter, it reads as a prose tic rather than a controlled exception, and it runs against the constitution's ban on elliptical clipping in narration.
findings.rewrite_direction: Recast the fragment-heavy beats anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:155, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:193, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:211, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:247, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:263 into full grammatical sentences or fold them into adjacent syntax. Preserve Owen's obsessive emphasis, but vary the cadence and stop relying on stripped noun-phrase fragments for punch.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Preserve productive dialogue roughness; do not clean living speech into balanced thesis statements.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the premise's sharpest contradiction: school-year comedy, adolescent awkwardness, punitive cruelty, and cosmic dread may coexist in the same novel without canceling each other. When a scene offers a cleaner version and a truer version, choose the truer one unless the character is actively refusing perception on the page.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If pain, cruelty, fear, or moral ugliness would leave a bodily or environmental trace, render that trace instead of summarizing it into tasteful haze.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High. Contractions are the spoken norm for most characters; fuller forms are reserved for Snape, ritual language, or deliberate emphasis.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate scene density, dialogue load, and movement mode aggressively: confrontation against quiet meals, subterranean revelation against corridor farce, ritual compression against spring drift, so no consecutive chapters feel built from the same emotional or structural template.
prose_style_profile.diction: British boarding-school realism under wartime pressure, with speculative vocabulary introduced only when Owen's attention earns it.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third limited through Owen, with only brief sensory widenings that he could plausibly notice in the moment.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate analytic accumulation with blunt corporeal sentences. Quiet chapters should breathe; punishment and ritual chapters should tighten without clipping grammar.
